name: Shadar-Kai
sourceBook: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
summary: Shadar-kai are the elves of the Shadowfell, originally drawn to that dread realm by the Raven Queen. Over the centuries, some of them have continued to serve her, while others have ventured into the Material Plane to forge their own destinies.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. The Player’s Handbook offers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.

coreTraits.name: Creature Type
coreTraits.summary: You are a Humanoid. You are also considered an elf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be an elf.

coreTraits.name: Starting at 3rd level, you also gain resistance to all damage when you teleport using this trait
coreTraits.summary: The resistance lasts until the start of your next turn. During that time, you appear ghostly and translucent.

coreTraits.name: Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

coreTraits.name: Fey Ancestry
coreTraits.summary: You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the charmed condition on yourself.

coreTraits.name: Keen Senses
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

coreTraits.name: Necrotic Resistance
coreTraits.summary: You have resistance to necrotic damage.

coreTraits.name: Whenever you finish this trance, you can gain two proficiencies that you don’t have, each one with a weapon or a tool of your choice selected from the Player’s Handbook
coreTraits.summary: You mystically acquire these proficiencies by drawing them from shared elven memory, and you retain them until you finish your next long rest.

notes: source isolated from page-content and table of contents
raw text is preserved in page.html for manual inspection
